title: Tax Season | #shorts
full_text: shelab did you congratulate Zoya on her summer internship of course I did I called her and what did she say she was really excited and I'm excited for her she's going to be making money for the first time she told me about her rental and I said that's a good rent cuz it's 40% of her salary and she was shocked because she thought that it's only 20% of her salary because she didn't account for taxes so I explained to her the idea of taxes and she was so shocked she goes I'm not married or nothing I don't have any kids why do I have to pay dead
